channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: fastfire/deepdarkCTI
item.description: Collection of Cyber Threat Intelligence sources from the deep and dark web

item.title: GorvGoyl/Clone-Wars
item.description: 100+ open-source clones of popular sites like Airbnb, Amazon, Instagram, Netflix, Tiktok, Spotify, Whatsapp, Youtube etc. See source code, demo links, tech stack, github stars.

item.title: cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
item.description: A curated list of free courses with certifications. Also available at https://free-certifications.com/

item.title: PicoTrex/Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
item.description: A curated collection of fun and creative examples generated with Nano Banana & Nano Banana Pro🍌, Gemini-2.5-flash-image based model. We also release Nano-consistent-150K openly to support the community's development of image generation and unified models(click to website to see our blog)

item.title: ruanyf/weekly
item.description: 科技爱好者周刊，每周五发布
